---
name: "Oliver"
surname: "Nash"
image: ../static/people/students/OlliePhoto.jpg
linkedin: oliver-nash1
orcid: 0009-0005-1167-0733
github: OllieNash
info:
  - "Oliver's PhD focuses on inference & inverse problems for stochastic interacting particle systems. He is supervised by Professor Grigorios Pavliotis and Dr Nikolas Kantas. Previous research has focused on small noise limits of SDEs & PINNs."
  - "He is an Imperial Sports Scholar for Fencing currently holding a top 50 British ranking."
interests:
  - Stochastic analysis 
  - Applied PDE theory 
  - Numerical analysis 
  - Statistical inference 
education:
  - institution: "PSL - Dauphiné & ENS"
    location: Paris, France
    degree: M2 in Theoretical and applied mathematics
    startdate: Sept 2023
    enddate: Sept 2024
  - institution: Durham University 
    location: Durham, UK
    degree: MMath in mathematics
    startdate: Sep 2019
    enddate: Jul 2023
Publications: 
   title: SPDEBench, An Extensive Benchmark for Learning Stochastic PDEs
   year: 2026
   doi: 10.48550/arXiv.2505.18511 
---

{{< academic-webpage >}}
